title: Why is Shinji in front of Rei in this picture
display_title: Why is Shinji in front of Rei in this picture
wikitext:
[]: Why is Shinji in front of Rei in this picture?             Quote Post by Collossus » Thu Jun 06, 2013 10:27 pm Never undestood why he's in front of her. And Never understood why there's no Gendo and Kaworu too. Does someone know? Thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Thu Jun 06, 2013 10:34 pm Because Rei is the Dororo of Evangelion. This deserves a mention in the "Does Anno hate Rei?" thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Collossus » Thu Jun 06, 2013 10:36 pm This deserves a mention in the "Does Anno hate Rei?" thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Thu Jun 06, 2013 10:39 pm Collossus wrote: I was the OP of that thread.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 07, 2013 12:52 am Because it's a group shot, and in a situation like that I would not be surprised to see Rei as the only one who wouldn't try to be seen by the camera. She's weird like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Rena » Fri Jun 07, 2013 3:03 am I think someone said once that the Rei behind Shinji was Rei II. By the end of the series, Rei is there, but she wasn't the Rei he knew. That picture was when Shinji was talking with Rei III, Yui and Kaworu, so they wouldn't need to be there, since he's telling them that there were people he wanted to see again. Completely irrelevant, but Hyuga's face in that picture always makes me giggle.

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Jun 07, 2013 3:07 am I thought it was something cynical like Rei not belonging in a social crowd like that. I hope and sure that there is probably a better meaning to it. I never understood the bridge bunnies presences in the final episodes. Shinji probably doesn't even know their names.

[]: Re: Why is Shinji in front of Rei in this picture?             Quote Post by gchristnsn » Fri Jun 07, 2013 3:16 am Collossus wrote: And Never understood why there's no Gendo and Kaworu too.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Jun 07, 2013 12:56 pm I'm running with Evamonkey here; it seems more Rei-ish for her not to be trying to get in the shot.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jun 07, 2013 6:59 pm In other news: Kaji's right hand.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jun 07, 2013 7:18 pm I would say it's allegorical. Rei is not going to be an overt part of the the new world which people return to. She will only remain as a watcher in the background, seeing but unseen.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jun 07, 2013 7:38 pm Jayfive wrote: In other news: Kaji's right hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Angel of Will » Fri Jun 07, 2013 9:04 pm I think it's assuming too much to say that Gendo remains dead, or that his soul wasn't collected in EoE. If I am to take Gendo's death vision quasi-literally, his soul is with Yui in Eva-01 because of being eaten by it. But that's just a hypothesis, probably wrong. At least in TV 25-26, Gendo is present during Instrumentality (and it has been heard from the staff that EoTV is of the same continuity, but a different perspective). I think Gendo wasn't there for him, so it's natural that he wouldn't be in the photo. The ending is about going back to the real world and living with human beings, so semi-Gods like Yui, Rei, and Kaworu wouldn't count.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jun 08, 2013 1:36 am Jayfive wrote: In other news: Kaji's right hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Jun 08, 2013 11:42 am And because Kaji's right hand, Misato's face = ' So dead' BTW, people asking where Gendo/Fuyu/Yui are: who do you think is taking the picture? Yes all three of them. Gendo and Yui are pretty much inseperable and Fuyu....well he's not going to be in a pic with a bunch of kids is he?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jun 08, 2013 5:01 pm The ppl are all just "being themselves" in this picture, doing something repesentative of their personality - Kaji letting his hands wander, Aoba being pictured with his guitar etc. An obvious thing to do that with Rei would to portray her with a book, but why would she be holding one when they're taking a photograph? It's just like her not to really place much importance in having her face visible her, in a way as halfway-comical as Kaji's gropin', Asuka's devil sighn or Touji's stupid grin. A reminder of happier times, basically. ...The script discribes it as "a photo taken around ep 16". Kaworu wasn't around by then, and Gendo (and Fuyutsuki!) aren't the type for this sort of socia action thing, as Kaji lampshades in ep 17. Gendo just doesn't do get-togethers. ...That also means that this is Rei II. But that doesn't have to mean much, after all, Kaji is also in there. --- Personally, I didn't initially notice that Rei was in there, and took it as a good sighn when I finally noticed her, like, years later. That she is also one of the ppl he wanted to see again, and wasn't somehow left out as an "illusion" - which would be inconsistent anyway, since she IS in that earlier montage about "parts of others you don't know" along with Asuka and Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Jun 08, 2013 6:49 pm Kendrix wrote: ...The script discribes it as "a photo taken around ep 16".

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jun 08, 2013 7:19 pm Jayfive wrote: Thats interesting. Maybe it was a office motivational thing to celebrate Shinji's high synch scores. Course Asuka wasn't happy at that, but you know she's never going to pass up the chance to be the centre of attention in a photo :P

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jun 09, 2013 11:16 am What's that thing that Hyuga appears to be holding in the background?

[]:             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Sun Jun 09, 2013 1:08 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: What's that thing that Hyuga appears to be holding in the background?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Thu Jun 06, 2013 10:34 pm Because Rei is the Dororo of Evangelion. This deserves a mention
